title: tephrosia scopulata
intro: Tephrosia scopulata, also known as the Desert Sweet Pea, is a small, annual legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tephrosia scopulata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia scopulata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat skin irritations, wounds, and gastrointestinal problems.
